stemHtml:
What are the main advantages of the integrated avionics EFB over the PEDs EFB?

1. It is usable during any flight phase
2. Can be integrated with the aircraft’s EFIS
3. It is the cheapest EFB option available on the market
4. Does not rely on external wires from a socket to be powered
5. It is well visible under any lighting conditions
6. It can be maintained by the flight crew itself
7. It doesn’t need any additional certification from the operator
